results.rendered_html:
sam-pra-√sthā Ā. -tiṣṭhate, to take up a position together (before the altar),  ŚāṅkhBr. ;
to set out together, depart, proceed, advance, approach, go to (acc. or loc.),  PraśnUp. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. sthāpayati, to dispatch, send out to (acc.),  R.
